name: fadecandy_msgs
description: ROS msgs for fadecandy LED controllers

LEDArray.description: The fadecandy board supports up to 8 LED strips. Each strip can have up to
LEDArray.raw:
# The fadecandy board supports up to 8 LED strips. Each strip can have up to
# 64 LEDs.
LEDStrip[] strips

LEDStrip.description: Color of each LED in the strip. Fadecandy firmware only allows up to 64 LEDs per strip.
LEDStrip.raw:
# Color of each LED in the strip. Fadecandy firmware only allows up to 64 LEDs per strip.
# Only the R, G, and B values get used; the alpha value is ignored.
std_msgs/ColorRGBA[] colors
